theme_and_archetype.archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) blended with Neo-Brutalist Structural Elements
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The target audience is Gen Z (students, freshers) and startups. The app needs to feel trustworthy, approachable, and youthful. Combining a soft pastel base (Archetype 3) with rigid, high-contrast borders (Neo-Brutalist) creates a 'Pastel-Brutalist' aesthetic that is highly engaging, modern, and distinct from typical SaaS.

headings.reasoning: Outfit provides a geometric, modern, and friendly voice that avoids the generic feel of Inter/Roboto.

body.reasoning: Highly legible for data-heavy dashboard tables and clear for task descriptions, complementing Outfit perfectly.

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers must have internal padding to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid for features. Asymmetrical layout mixing col-span-4 and col-span-8. Deep gaps (gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room'. Dense. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Clear North Star metrics on top left.

borders_and_shadows.border: 2px solid #0F172A (CRITICAL: everywhere on cards, inputs, buttons)
borders_and_shadows.radius: rounded-xl (sharp enough for structure, round enough for friendly vibe)

component_rules.buttons: bg-primary text-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3
component_rules.cards: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] transition-transform
component_rules.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-lg p-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none
component_rules.badges: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-full
component_rules.marquee: Use for 'Task Categories'. Font: Outfit, text-4xl outline-text. Fast, smooth drift.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Tactile 'push' effect. Elements move down/right slightly, shadow reduces to simulate pressing.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: None to keep it snappy. Micro-interactions on buttons, cards, and inputs are priority.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Prefers-reduced-motion respected. Strict contrast ratio maintained by the 2px dark borders and dark text.

icons_and_assets.visual_decorations: SVG starbursts, abstract shapes (using the pastel accent colors) overlapping the brutalist borders. Sticker-like tags.

hero.description: Student working on a laptop, perfect for worker landing page representation.
Startup team in a modern office, representing clients posting tasks.

logos.description: Slack logo placeholder for trusted companies section.
Pexels logo placeholder for trusted companies section.

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='submit-work-button'
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a pastel neo-brutalist aesthetic using .js files (not .tsx). Use Outfit for headings and Plus Jakarta Sans for body. Do not use generic Shadcn styling; override borders to be 2px solid #0F172A and add hard drop shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]) to buttons and cards to create the tactile, Gen Z-friendly look. Ensure the hero image does not get obscured by a completely flat dark overlay. Integrate the specified data-testid tags on all interactive elements. Install @phosphor-icons/react.
